description: Create and deploy a channel named 'MRN_Quality_Firewall' that filters HL7 ADT messages based on Patient ID format. The channel must listen on TCP port 6661. Route messages with a 6-digit numerical Patient ID (PID-3.1) to '/home/ga/valid', prefixing the ID with 'MRN-' (e.g., '123456' -> 'MRN-123456'). Route messages with any other ID format to '/home/ga/quarantine' as a plain text file containing the error string: 'Invalid MRN detected: <Original_ID>'. Test messages are provided in '/home/ga/test_messages/'. Use the NextGen Connect Administrator or the REST API. The dashboard at https://localhost:8443 is monitoring-only.
